chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-779 of 2023 (Asif Ali Bhutto Vs. The State and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case. 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA No.l 6546/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No. 6547/2023 (Stay/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 04-12-2023. Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3&4. At the very outset, it is stated by the learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Crl. Misc. Application before this Court on merits, provided the applicant is permitted to seek his premature acquittal by making such application before learned trial Court, which is not opposed by learned DPG for the State. In view of above, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed with direction to learned trial Court to dispose of the application of the applicant, if it is filed by him for his premature acquitted within one month of its filing, strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
